name: KINGSTONE COMPANIES, INC.
business: Kingstone Companies, Inc. offers property and casualty insurance products through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Kingstone Insurance Company (KICO). KICO is a New York domiciled carrier writing personal lines and commercial auto insurance, and in 2024 was the 12th largest writer of homeowners insurance in New York. The company also accesses alternative distribution channels through its subsidiary Cosi Agency, Inc.
sellsTo: Retail and wholesale agents and brokers
Personal lines policyholders in New York

exposures.sentence: We offer property and casualty insurance products through our wholly-owned subsidiary, Kingstone Insurance Company ( KICO ).
As a property and casualty insurer, we may face significant losses from catastrophes and severe weather events.

catalysts.event: Sale of headquarters building to Ulster County
catalysts.sentence: On February 5, 2025, one of our subsidiaries entered into a contract of sale with Ulster County, New York (the County ) for the sale to the County of our headquarters building in Kingston, New York, along with an adjacent mixed-use property (collectively, the Property ). The purchase price for the Property was $3,600,000. The closing of the sale was on March 19, 2025.
On January 31, 2025 we paid $3,500,000 in principal, plus accrued interest
on February 24, 2025 we paid $2,450,000 in principal, plus accrued interest.
Effective July 1, 2025, KICO increased the top limit of its catastrophe reinsurance coverage from $280,000,000 to $440,000,000

On April 14, 2025, KICO entered into an agreement to offer a quote for a replacement policy to selected homeowners policyholders in Downstate New York as one of our competitors pivoted focus away from admitted personal lines business (the 'Withdrawal Plan').
On July 22, 2025, our Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $0.05 per share which was paid in cash on August 26, 2025
On October 30, 2025, our Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $0.05 per share which was paid in cash on November 26, 2025
In 2025, KICO made the decision to withdraw from writing any business in the state of New Jersey.

catalysts.event: Expansion into California on excess and surplus lines basis
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, we announced that we intend to expand into new markets starting with California on an excess and surplus lines basis in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: 5-Year Growth Plan: target $500 million direct written premium
catalysts.sentence: We recently announced our 5-year goal of $500 million in direct written premium (the '5-Year Growth Plan'), effectively almost doubling the size of our company relative to today.
